mapper.select: SELECT dat_id as datId, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT dat_id as datId, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE dat_id = #{datId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL ( customer_id, product_id, account_number, account_password, balance, interest_rate, account_status, auto_transfer_enabled, auto_transfer_amount, auto_transfer_day ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{productId}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountPassword}, #{balance}, #{interestRate}, #{accountStatus}, #{autoTransferEnabled}, #{autoTransferAmount}, #{autoTransferDay} )
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = #{balance}, interest_rate = #{interestRate}, account_status = #{accountStatus}, auto_transfer_enabled = #{autoTransferEnabled}, auto_transfer_amount = #{autoTransferAmount}, auto_transfer_day = #{autoTransferDay} WHERE dat_id = #{datId}
